case_title: STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR VS. VIETNAM TOO RESTAURANT, LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARS ENFORCEMENT STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT VIETNAM TOO RESTAURANT, LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY, DBA VIETNAM TOO RESTAURANT JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARS ENFORCEMENT STATE OF CALIFORNIA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARS ENFORCEMENT STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VIETNAM TOO RESTAURANT, LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY, DBA VIETNAM TOO RESTAURANT $12,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,000.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
